category_sources: source_facts.description says infat sets default openers for file formats and URL schemes on macOS.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is infat; official GitHub repository at source_facts.homepage uses the infat name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies macOS default opener management for file formats and URL schemes; source_facts.executables lists infat CLI.
